title: Šiauliai, Šiauliai County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Šiauliai, Šiauliai County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Šiauliai is a city in Šiauliai County with a population of 100,000. Lithuania’s fourth-largest city, known for the Hill of Crosses nearby, a vibrant university life, and a growing manufacturing and logistics sector.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
